description_long: This is a detailed stone sculpture of a seated male figure with a long, flowing beard and draped robes. The figure is depicted in a contemplative pose, with one arm resting on a tablet or block and the other hand holding part of his beard. The facial features are finely carved, and the hair and beard are rendered with intricate texture. The figure's feet are visible beneath the drapery, and the sculpture sits on a rectangular plinth. The surface shows signs of weathering, suggesting it is intended for outdoor display.
description: A finely detailed stone sculpture of a seated, bearded man in draped robes, holding a tablet and his beard, with intricate facial and hair features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, detailed beard, and both arms, with the right hand holding the beard and the left resting on a tablet.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the face, the drapery of the robes, and the positioning of the legs and feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the draped fabric, with less detail on the facial features.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side of the face, the arm holding the beard, and the tablet resting on the lap.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with a beard and draped robes
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific environment.
